data.name: Lust for Darkness VR
data.detailed_description:
You receive a letter from your wife who has gone missing a year ago. Following the message, you head for a secluded mansion where a perverse occult ceremony takes place. Gates to another world - the profane, perverse land of Lusst’ghaa are opened. Do you dare cross into the twisted realm of carnal ecstasy?

Discover the secrets of a Victorian mansion and Lusst’ghaa - an eldritch dimension filled with otherworldly creatures, whose inhabitants decided to undergo total degeneration at their own wish.

Through experimentation they transformed their bodies, so they could never cease to experience carnal delights. Hundreds of years have passed since that metamorphosis, and Lusst’ghaa has become a world overgrown with eldritch vegetation, and full of monstrosities squirming in never-ending ecstasy.

FEATURES

  • Psychological horror fully adapted for Virtual Reality

  • Erotic and occult themes

  • World design inspired by works of Lovecraft, Giger & Zdzisław Beksiński

  • Explore a Victorian mansion and the perverse world of Lusst’ghaa

  • Use eldritch portals to cross between two realities

  • Search for hidden items to unlock side stories

  • Escape the grasp of monstrous inhabitants of Lusst’ghaa

  • Original soundtrack by Draco Nared

data.short_description: Enter the Yelvertons’ Victorian mansion and discover the perverse reality of Lusst’ghaa - now in Virtual Reality! Inspired by the works of Lovecraft and Zdzisław Beksiński, this psychological horror guides you through an intriguing plot filled with erotic and occult themes.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i7-4790 / AMD Ryzen 5 1600 or greater (only Oculus Rift, for Vive see Recomended spec)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 or greater (only Oculus Rift, for Vive see Recomended spec)
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or OpenXR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i7-7700K equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 / AMD Radeon RX 5700 or greater
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
